revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} ==Location== [[File:Sister link template columns problem.jpg|thumb|If using a large, graphical template produces odd layout problems, like the excessive white space shown on the right of this screenshot, then switch to a different sister template.]]
{{cross}} '''Do not place this template in a section all by itself.'''
{{cross}} '''Do not place this template in a section containing columns.'''
This template should normally be placed at the ''top'' of the <nowiki>==External links==</nowiki> section at the end of an article, if the article has a section for [[WP:EL|external links]]. If no such section exists, then please place it at the top of the last section in the article.
On [[WP:DAB|disambiguation pages]], this template should be listed above other text, but below any cleanup templates, images, infoboxes or navboxes.<!-- Per WP:ACCESS, cleanup templates, images, infoboxes, and navboxes are always first. -->
See {{section link|Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects|Where to place links}} for more information and alternatives.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Interwiki link sidebar templates|Meta]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} ==Location== [[File:Sister link template columns problem.jpg|thumb|If using a large, graphical template produces odd layout problems, like the excessive white space shown on the right of this screenshot, then switch to a different sister template.]]
{{cross}} '''Do not place this template in a section all by itself.'''
{{cross}} '''Do not place this template in a section containing columns.'''
This template should normally be placed at the ''top'' of the <nowiki>==External links==</nowiki> section at the end of an article, if the article has a section for [[WP:EL|external links]]. If no such section exists, then please place it at the top of the last section in the article.
On [[WP:DAB|disambiguation pages]], this template should be listed above other text, but below any cleanup templates, images, infoboxes or navboxes.<!-- Per WP:ACCESS, cleanup templates, images, infoboxes, and navboxes are always first. -->
See {{section link|Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects|Where to place links}} for more information and alternatives.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Interwiki link sidebar templates|Meta]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} ==Location== [[File:Sister link template columns problem.jpg|thumb|If using a large, graphical template produces odd layout problems, like the excessive white space shown on the right of this screenshot, then switch to a different sister template.]]
{{cross}} '''Do not place this template in a section all by itself.'''
{{cross}} '''Do not place this template in a section containing columns.'''
This template should normally be placed at the ''top'' of the <nowiki>==External links==</nowiki> section at the end of an article, if the article has a section for [[WP:EL|external links]]. If no such section exists, then please place it at the top of the last section in the article.
On [[WP:DAB|disambiguation pages]], this template should be listed above other text, but below any cleanup templates, images, infoboxes or navboxes.<!-- Per WP:ACCESS, cleanup templates, images, infoboxes, and navboxes are always first. -->
See {{section link|Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects|Where to place links}} for more information and alternatives.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Interwiki link sidebar templates|Meta]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} ==Location== [[File:Sister link template columns problem.jpg|thumb|If using a large, graphical template produces odd layout problems, like the excessive white space shown on the right of this screenshot, then switch to a different sister template.]]
{{cross}} '''Do not place this template in a section all by itself.'''
{{cross}} '''Do not place this template in a section containing columns.'''
This template should normally be placed at the ''top'' of the <nowiki>==External links==</nowiki> section at the end of an article, if the article has a section for [[WP:EL|external links]]. If no such section exists, then please place it at the top of the last section in the article.
On [[WP:DAB|disambiguation pages]], this template should be listed above other text, but below any cleanup templates, images, infoboxes or navboxes.<!-- Per WP:ACCESS, cleanup templates, images, infoboxes, and navboxes are always first. -->
See {{section link|Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects|Where to place links}} for more information and alternatives.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Interwiki link sidebar templates|Meta]] }}</includeonly> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23513454770|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} ==Location== [[File:Sister link template columns problem.jpg|thumb|If using a large, graphical template produces odd layout problems, like the excessive white space shown on the right of this screenshot, then switch to a different sister template.]]
{{cross}} '''Do not place this template in a section all by itself.'''
{{cross}} '''Do not place this template in a section containing columns.'''
This template should normally be placed at the ''top'' of the <nowiki>==External links==</nowiki> section at the end of an article, if the article has a section for [[WP:EL|external links]]. If no such section exists, then please place it at the top of the last section in the article.
On [[WP:DAB|disambiguation pages]], this template should be listed above other text, but below any cleanup templates, images, infoboxes or navboxes.<!-- Per WP:ACCESS, cleanup templates, images, infoboxes, and navboxes are always first. -->
See {{section link|Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects|Where to place links}} for more information and alternatives.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Interwiki link sidebar templates|Meta]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24947213578|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} ==Location== [[File:Sister link template columns problem.jpg|thumb|If using a large, graphical template produces odd layout problems, like the excessive white space shown on the right of this screenshot, then switch to a different sister template.]]
{{cross}} '''Do not place this template in a section all by itself.'''
{{cross}} '''Do not place this template in a section containing columns.'''
This template should normally be placed at the ''top'' of the <nowiki>==External links==</nowiki> section at the end of an article, if the article has a section for [[WP:EL|external links]]. If no such section exists, then please place it at the top of the last section in the article.
On [[WP:DAB|disambiguation pages]], this template should be listed above other text, but below any cleanup templates, images, infoboxes or navboxes.
See {{section link|Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects|Where to place links}} for more information and alternatives.
